title: No Creeper Griefing
description: Disables Creeper block damage by simulating "mobGriefing = false" only for mob explosions. Creepers still deal player damage, and Villagers continue their normal work since the global "mobGriefing" rule can remain set to "true".
body: Disables Creeper block damage by simulating "mobGriefing = false" only for mob explosions. Creepers still deal player damage, and Villagers continue their normal work since the global "mobGriefing" rule can remain set to "true".
